ops.text:
E21 — session-correlation influence audit. Cap $0 (pure compute, no LLM spend). Measurement, not a hypothesis test.

PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL:
Concern: train pipeline dedups only via global char-5-gram Jaccard>=0.8 on draft_text (near_dup_representatives, data.py:267, applied at TRAIN time in watcher.py:484). Within-session near-duplicate/correlated corrections below that threshold survive → pseudo-replication inflates effective N.

Inputs (READ-ONLY snapshot /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/_base-20260719):
- dataset/watcher/train.parquet = nominal training pool (6731 rows pre-dedup; each row = one (context->reference) training pair with id, session_id, label, category, verbatim). 813 distinct sessions. label: 3418 True(steer)/3313 False(NO_STEER). watcher `id` is the canonical pair id (sft ids == watcher positives exactly; dpo/kto largely covered).
- feedback.db exemplar_embedding: 3153 voyage-4-large dim-1024 L2-normalized vectors keyed by dedup_key==watcher id; cover 2977/3418 positives, 0 negatives → free semantic signal for corrections.

Methods:
1. Pairs-per-session distribution (count, max, mean/median, tail/Gini).
2. Near-dup clustering WITHIN session vs ACROSS session, two independent metrics:
   a. char-5-gram Jaccard on draft_text (pipeline-faithful; reuse data.shingles/jaccard/_minhash_signatures/_lsh_candidates/_union_find_roots), thresholds {0.8 pipeline, 0.6, 0.5}. Split all near-dup pairs into within- vs cross-session.
   b. voyage-4-large cosine on 2977 embedded positives, thresholds {0.95,0.90,0.85}. Within vs cross.
3. Effective sample size: ESS_default = sum(weight)=n within-session near-dup clusters (char-5-gram 0.8); also Kish ESS; whole-session-block extreme (n_sessions) as lower bound; report threshold sweep.
4. Weights parquet at out/session-weights.parquet: id->weight=1/within_session_cluster_size (default char-5-gram 0.8, covers all 6731), plus alt columns (ngram0.6, ngram0.5, semantic0.90, session-uniform) for E28 flexibility. sum(default weight)==n_clusters.

SUCCESS CRITERION: emit session-weights.parquet (pair id->weight, all 6731 rows) + report with headline {sessions, pairs, max_pairs_per_session, effective_sample_size, weights_path}. Raw artifacts (per-threshold cluster tables, distributions JSON) kept under out/ for verify-lane re-derivation. PENDING-E15: point estimate + bootstrap CI where a number carries uncertainty; no promote/kill verdict (this is measurement feeding E28).
